things.name: Charminar
things.description: 1591 four-minaret triumphal arch and mosque at the heart of the old city

things.name: Golconda Fort
things.description: 16th-century Qutb Shahi fortress with acoustic signalling and the Koh-i-Noor diamond heritage

things.name: Qutb Shahi Tombs
things.description: Seven spectacular Qutb Shahi dynasty tombs in restored gardens

things.name: Salar Jung Museum
things.description: World's largest one-person art collection with the famous split-second Veiled Rebecca statue

things.name: Laad Bazaar (Chudi Bazaar)
things.description: Hyderabad's famous bangle market next to Charminar - glass, lac and precious stone bangles

things.name: Ramoji Film City
things.description: World's largest film studio complex with Bollywood sets open for tours

things.name: Hussain Sagar Lake
things.description: Artificial lake with India's largest monolithic Buddha statue on an island

things.name: Birla Mandir
things.description: White marble hilltop temple with city views and fine Nalgonda white marble sculpture

things.name: Nizam's Museum
things.description: Royal artefacts of the world's wealthiest man - the Nizam of Hyderabad

things.name: Dum Biryani at Paradise
things.description: Hyderabadi biryani - slow-cooked with saffron in sealed clay pots - the finest in India
